data.value: Defending national champions after a historic 16-0 season, but Indiana must replace 10+ starters including Heisman QB Fernando Mendoza who entered the transfer portal. Added 39 newcomers including 17 transfers.
Returned as co-favorites at +700 despite losing to Miami in the 2025-26 quarterfinals. The Buckeyes remain a perennial powerhouse with elite recruiting and an experienced coaching staff.
Strong returning nucleus and elite recruiting class make Notre Dame perennial contenders at +750 for another deep CFP run.
Consistent playoff contender in the Big Ten era with strong NIL program and recruiting pipeline keeping them among co-favorites at +750.
